privileged_info_summary: The task 'configure_guidelines_page@1' operates in the Jitsi Meet environment (jitsi_meet_env@0.1) running on Ubuntu with Docker. The task requires creating a static HTML guidelines page with specific content ('Meeting Guidelines - Acme Corp' and 11 other required strings) and deploying it to /usr/share/jitsi-meet/guidelines.html in the Jitsi web container. The page must be accessible at http://localhost:8080/guidelines (Jitsi's default port 8080) via Nginx configuration changes, and a backup must be created at /home/ga/guidelines.html. All path specifications and URLs are consistent with standard Jitsi Meet Docker installation conventions. The data is synthetic (fictional 'Acme Corp' guidelines, not real company data).
